_publications._publicationTitle: Combined CDK4/6 and ERK1/2 Inhibition Enhances Antitumor Activity in NF1-Associated Plexiform Neurofibroma.
_publications._context: ...Human immortalized NF1 Schwann cells (ipNF05.5 and ipNF95.6) were obtained from the Peggy Wallace lab... | ipNF05.5 (hTERT NF1 ipNF05.5, RRID: CVCL_UI71; +/− NF1 ) cells (germline −/− NF1 mutation: c.3456_3457insA) | immortalized human plexiform neurofibroma cell lines (hereafter called pNF1 cells) described in [ 36 ] were used: ipNF95.11b C, ipNF95.11b C-RFP, and ipNF 05.5 | immortalized human plexiform neurofibroma cell lines (Nf1 −/−; hereafter called pNF1 cells) described in [23] were used: ipNF95.11b C and ipNF05.5 | Immortalised human Schwann cell lines with mutant NF1 (ipNF05.5 and 95.6) and wt NF1 (ipn02.3)
